calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintigg and opposing party in Pro Per You Liang Song (415-252-7313) is present. Court Interpreter: Benjamin Giang is present assisting the Plaintiff translate English into Mandarin and Mandarin into English. No other appearances.

Hearing Held. The Court inquires the plaintiff complied with the tentative ruling rule. You Song responds that he has not complied with the rule. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WAI SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintigg and opposing party in Pro Per You Liang Song (415-252-7313) is present. Court Interpreter: Benjamin Giang is present assisting the Plaintiff translate English into Mandarin and Mandarin into English. No other appearances.

Hearing Held. The Court inquires the plaintiff complied with the tentative ruling rule. You Song responds that he has not complied with the rule. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WAI SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege a cause of action against the defendant. Plaintiff should also indicate why venue is proper in this county based on whatever causes of action Plaintiff alleges. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
